rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §37.0082 governs academic assessment of students in disciplinary alternative education programs; it is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: To assess a student's academic growth during placement in a disciplinary alternative education program, a school district shall administer to a student placed in a program for a period of 90 school days or longer an assessment instrument approved by the commissioner for that purpose.
_note: Rule text concerns DAEP student assessment; no nexus to property tax homestead exemption levels.
